text.message: Don’t want to trade it just giving you the chance to offer more
Black surprised your set up worked so well
Have you heard of make it hard for the guy with 11 cards
Have you heard of help yhe guy on 2?
Why do I have to help you lol
It’s your job to offer good trades for me
Then maybe I dont need to trade someone else
I agree it’s blue but makes sense to hit both
I'm gonna lose road and blue's gonna take army
Oj the king of bad trades
You should only trade people on your turn bro
They are on 7 it helps them more than you
Why is no one trading me on my tuen then
Because they understand you don’t trade for nothing
Im not going to give more than one card
Then youd say im bad at trading again
Are you helping me take road? No
Are you helping me anything? No
I can help you take road
But we need to worry about blue
Yeah I need wheat to roll
black likely on 8 with 2 open settles
While I would need to have a vp and 2 settles which isn't happening...
Didnt think you could take road?
Red's just trying to get both
I’m more worried about blue than black
But at least blue can’t connect
Well blue wasn't even when you're his army competition andd 2 2other people can easily take road over me
Well black I’ve been saying it’s blue for a while
red double plays for the win
